plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Plugin non configuré : renseignez au min: Plugin not configured: please enter at least the Client ID and Client Secret.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Les identifiants Client ID et Client Sec: The Client ID and Client Secret credentials are not provided by Stellantis to individuals: they must be extracted from your brand's mobile application (APK) using an external tool. Refer to the plugin documentation for the procedure.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Détermine le serveur d'authentification: Determines the authentication server (idpcvs) and realm used
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Identifiant client OAuth2 de l'applicati: OAuth2 client identifier of the brand's mobile application (extracted using an external tool)
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Secret client OAuth2 (stocké chiffré, ja: OAuth2 client secret (stored encrypted, never displayed in clear text)
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Code pays à 2 lettres (ex. fr) utilisé p: 2-letter country code (e.g. fr) used to build the default redirect URL
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.redirect_uri OAuth2 (schéma de l'app mob: OAuth2 redirect_uri (brand's mobile app scheme, e.g. mymap://oauth2redirect/fr)
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Laisser vide pour utiliser le défaut de: Leave empty to use the brand's default
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Laisser vide pour utiliser le service de: Leave empty to use the default mapping service (OpenStreetMap)
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Laisser vide pour utiliser le service pa: Leave empty to use the default service
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Coordonnées de votre domicile : chaque v: Coordinates of your home: each vehicle will expose an «At home» (1/0) info usable in your scenarios. Leave empty to disable.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Latitude en degrés décimaux (ex. 48.8566: Latitude in decimal degrees (e.g. 48.8566). Leave empty to disable geofencing.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Longitude en degrés décimaux (ex. 2.3522: Longitude in decimal degrees (e.g. 2.3522). Leave empty to disable geofencing.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Rayon en mètres autour du domicile pour: Radius in meters around the home to consider the vehicle «at home». Leave empty to use the default (150 m).
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Télécharge l'application mobile de la ma: Downloads the mobile app for the selected brand (~100 MB) and automatically extracts the Client ID and Client Secret, without installing any external tool. Select the brand and country first.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Renseigne le Client ID et le Client Secr: Fills in the Client ID and Client Secret from your brand's mobile app. If it fails, manual entry remains possible (see the plugin documentation).
Optional: full URL of the .apk.bz2 archive used by the automatic extraction. Only fill this in if the default community repository is unavailable or has been moved.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Laisser vide pour utiliser le dépôt par: Leave empty to use the default repository
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Facultatif : serveur MQTT utilisé par le: Optional: MQTT server used by the remote control daemon. Only fill this in if the default server does not work for your brand.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Facultatif : port du socket local entre: Optional: local socket port between Jeedom and the daemon. Only change it in case of a port conflict with another plugin.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Non connecté : suivez les deux étapes ci: Not connected: follow the two steps below after saving the configuration
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Ouvrez cette URL dans votre navigateur e: Open this URL in your browser and log in with the account of your brand's mobile application
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Après connexion, le navigateur affiche u: After logging in, the browser shows an error page (this is normal): copy the full URL (starting with mymap://... and containing code=). If nothing appears, retrieve the code parameter (36 characters) from the Network tab (F12). Paste it without delay: the code expires quickly.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Collez l'URL de redirection complète (re: Paste the full redirect URL (recommended) or the code alone
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Collez d'abord l'URL de redirection (ou: First paste the redirect URL (or the code) into the field
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Le plugin va télécharger (~100 Mo) et an: The plugin will download (~100 MB) and analyze your brand's mobile app, hosted on a third-party community repository, to extract your credentials. This API is not official. Continue?
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Téléchargement de l'application mobile e: Downloading the mobile app (~100 MB), please wait…
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Le pilotage à distance (réveil, charge,: Remote control (wake-up, charging, locking…) requires a one-time activation by SMS + the PIN code of your mobile app. Warning: the quotas are strict and permanent on Stellantis' side (6 codes per 24 h, 20 SMS activations per account for life). Only activate when you are ready.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Réutilise l'appareil OTP déjà enregistré: Reuses the OTP device already registered to obtain a new remote token, without consuming an SMS activation. Prefer this option whenever possible.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Sans nouveau SMS. Si le renouvellement é: Without a new SMS. If the renewal fails, redo the full activation below.
Remote control is already activated. A new SMS activation is only needed after expiration (in that case use «Renew»): it would consume one activation from the permanent quota (20 per account).
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Déclenche l'envoi d'un SMS contenant un: Triggers the sending of an SMS containing a code to the phone number associated with your brand account.
First connect the account (above). An SMS will be sent to the number associated with your account.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Le code PIN à 4 chiffres que vous utilis: The 4-digit PIN code you use in your brand's mobile app.
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Un SMS d'activation va être envoyé au nu: An activation SMS will be sent to your account's number. This quota is limited (20 per account for life) and permanent on Stellantis' side. Continue?
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Renseignez le code reçu par SMS et le co: Enter the code received by SMS and the PIN code of your mobile app
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Ce compte est en lecture seule : le pilo: This account is read-only: remote control (commands) is only available on the primary account
plugins/stellantis/plugin_info/configura.Configurez d'abord le compte principal c: First configure the primary account above

plugins/stellantis/core/ajax/stellantis..Plugin non configuré : renseignez la mar: Plugin not configured: enter the brand, the Client ID and the Client Secret then save
plugins/stellantis/core/ajax/stellantis..Authentification réussie : le plugin est: Authentication successful: the plugin is connected to your account
plugins/stellantis/core/ajax/stellantis..Ce compte n'est pas configuré : renseign: This account is not configured: enter at least the Client ID and Client Secret, then save

plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Plugin non configuré : renseignez et sau: Plugin not configured: enter and save the configuration
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Compte non connecté : authentifiez-vous: Account not connected: authenticate before starting the daemon
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Plugin non configuré : renseignez la mar: Plugin not configured: enter the brand, the Client ID and the Client Secret then save
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Marque inconnue : impossible de détermin: Unknown brand: unable to determine which mobile app to download
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Extraction automatique indisponible : ré: Automatic extraction unavailable: try again or enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Extraction automatique indisponible (dép: Automatic extraction unavailable (missing Python dependencies?): install the plugin dependencies or enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Extraction automatique impossible : rées: Automatic extraction failed: try again or enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Une extraction vient d'être lancée : pat: An extraction has just been started: please wait before trying again
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Impossible de créer un fichier temporair: Unable to create a temporary file for the download
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Échec du téléchargement de l'application: Failed to download the mobile app: check your Jeedom's Internet connection, or enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Échec de la décompression de l'applicati: Failed to decompress the downloaded mobile app: the file is corrupted, incomplete, or too large. Try again or enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Application mobile illisible (archive in: Mobile app unreadable (invalid archive): try again or enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Structure de l'application mobile inatte: Unexpected mobile app structure (cultures.json not found or unreadable): it may have changed. Enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Pays « %s » absent de la liste des cultu: Country «%s» not found in the mobile app's culture list: check the country code or enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Structure de l'application mobile inatte: Unexpected mobile app structure (unreadable culture): enter the credentials manually.
Unexpected mobile app structure (parameters.json not found or unreadable): it may have changed. Enter the credentials manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Identifiants introuvables dans l'applica: Credentials not found in the mobile app (missing fields): enter them manually.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Identifiants extraits : vérifiez les cha: Credentials extracted: check the fields then save the configuration.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Un test vient d'être effectué : patiente: A test was just performed: wait a few seconds before retrying
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Connexion OK : %d véhicule(s) trouvé(s): Connection OK: %d vehicle(s) found on the account
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Connexion OK : aucun véhicule sur le com: Connection OK: no vehicle on the account
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Une synchronisation vient d'être effectu: A synchronization was just performed: wait a few seconds before retrying
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.%d véhicule(s) réapparu(s) laissé(s) dés: %d vehicle(s) reappeared and left deactivated: reactivate them manually if needed
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Aucune connexion au compte ou session ex: No connection to the account or expired session: (re)authenticate from the plugin configuration
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Token invalide malgré un rafraîchissemen: Invalid token despite a refresh: retry, then re-authenticate if the problem persists
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Trop de requêtes vers l'API : réessayez: Too many requests to the API: try again later
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Trop de requêtes vers l'API : pause de p: Too many requests to the API: protective pause, resuming in ~%d min
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.API injoignable : vérifiez la connexion: API unreachable: check your Jeedom's Internet connection
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Erreur API (HTTP %d) : consultez les log: API error (HTTP %d): check the plugin logs for details
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Erreur au dernier rafraîchissement : con: Error during the last refresh: check the plugin logs
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Mode privacy actif — données de localisa: Privacy mode active — location data restricted
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Le véhicule masque ses données (mode vie: The vehicle is hiding its data (privacy mode): this is not an error
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Ce véhicule est exclu du rafraîchissemen: This vehicle is excluded from the periodic refresh (user choice): this is not an error
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Les données seront renseignées au procha: Data will be populated at the next refresh
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Capacité batterie non renseignée — énerg: Battery capacity not set — charge energy not estimated
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Renseignez la capacité (kWh) dans la con: Enter the capacity (kWh) in the vehicle configuration to estimate the charge energy
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Renouvelez le jeton distant depuis la co: Renew the remote token from the plugin configuration (without SMS if possible)
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Réactivez le pilotage à distance (OTP) p: Reactivate remote control (OTP) then restart the daemon
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Le démon de pilotage à distance n'a pas: The remote control daemon failed to authenticate with the broker after several attempts. Check your connection and, if necessary, reactivate remote control (OTP) from the plugin configuration, then restart the daemon.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.SMS envoyé. Saisissez le code reçu et le: SMS sent. Enter the code received and the PIN code of your mobile app, then activate.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Renseignez le code reçu par SMS et le co: Enter the code received by SMS and the PIN code of your mobile app.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Quota de génération de codes OTP atteint: OTP code generation quota reached (%d / 24 h). Try again later.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Dépendances Python manquantes : installe: Missing Python dependencies: install the plugin dependencies, then try again.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Code SMS ou code PIN manquant ou invalid: SMS code or PIN code missing or invalid.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Activation refusée : vérifiez le code SM: Activation refused: check the SMS code and the PIN code, then try again. Watch out for the quota (6 codes / 24 h).
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Connectez d'abord le plugin à votre comp: First connect the plugin to your account (steps 1 and 2 above) before activating remote control.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Quota d'activations SMS atteint (%d / co: SMS activation quota reached (%d / account). This quota is permanent on Stellantis' side: no new SMS will be requested to avoid blocking your account.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Échec de l'envoi du SMS d'activation. Vé: Failed to send the activation SMS. Check the account connection and try again.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Aucun appareil OTP enregistré : réalisez: No OTP device registered: perform the full activation (SMS + PIN code).
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Impossible de générer un code OTP (quota: Unable to generate an OTP code (quota reached or invalid OTP device). If needed, redo the full activation (SMS + PIN code).
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Le renouvellement a échoué : refaites l': The renewal failed: redo the full activation (SMS + PIN code).
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Appareil OTP invalide : refaites l'activ: Invalid OTP device: redo the full activation (SMS + PIN code).
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.L'appareil OTP a été enregistré mais l'o: The OTP device has been registered but obtaining the remote token failed. Reload the page and use «Renew the remote token» (without a new SMS).
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Le jeton de pilotage à distance a expiré: The remote token has expired. Renew it (without SMS if an OTP device is still registered) or redo the OTP activation from the plugin configuration.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Réveil déjà demandé récemment ; patiente: Wake-up already requested recently; wait %d s (anti-ban / 12 V battery protection)
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Trop de réveils récents sur le compte ;: Too many recent wake-ups on the account; wait %d s (anti-ban protection)
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Pilotage à distance non activé : activez: Remote control not activated: activate OTP in the plugin configuration
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Identifiant client (CID) inconnu : refai: Customer ID (CID) unknown: redo the OTP activation
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Démon MQTT non démarré : impossible d'en: MQTT daemon not started: unable to send the command
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Envoi de la commande au démon MQTT échou: Failed to send the command to the MQTT daemon (daemon unavailable?)
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Commande de charge déjà envoyée à l'inst: Charge command already sent just now; wait %d s
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Commande de préconditionnement déjà envo: Preconditioning command already sent just now; wait %d s
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Commande de verrouillage déjà envoyée à: Lock command already sent just now; wait %d s
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Klaxon déjà déclenché à l'instant ; pati: Horn already triggered just now; wait %d s
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Feux déjà déclenchés à l'instant ; patie: Lights already triggered just now; wait %d s
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Commande à distance : session renouvelée: Remote command: session renewed for device #%d, please try again
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Configurez le compte principal depuis la: Configure the primary account from the plugin configuration
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Le pilotage à distance n'est disponible: Remote control is only available on the primary account
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Démarrez le démon depuis la page de conf: Start the daemon from the plugin configuration page
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Rate-limit de l'API PSA (HTTP 429) : app: PSA API rate limit (HTTP 429): calls temporarily suspended to protect the account from being blocked. Refreshing will resume automatically afterwards.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Rate-limit de l'API PSA (HTTP 429) sur l: PSA API rate limit (HTTP 429) on secondary account %s: calls temporarily suspended to protect the account from being blocked. Refreshing will resume automatically afterwards.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.La connexion au compte Stellantis a expi: The connection to the Stellantis account has expired (invalid or revoked refresh token). Reconnect from the plugin configuration.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.La connexion au compte secondaire %s a e: The connection to secondary account %s has expired (invalid or revoked refresh token). Reconnect from the plugin configuration.
plugins/stellantis/core/class/stellantis.Le véhicule « %s » est en mode vie privé: Vehicle «%s» is in privacy mode: data sharing (Data / Geolocation) has been turned off on the vehicle's side. Re-enable data sharing from the vehicle's screen to retrieve the position and telemetry. This is not a plugin malfunction.

plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Aucun véhicule trouvé, cliquer sur \"Syn: No vehicle found, click "Sync vehicles" to get started
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Numéro d'identification du véhicule (ren: Vehicle identification number (filled in by the synchronization)
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Identifiant du véhicule côté API Stellan: Vehicle identifier on the Stellantis API side (different from the VIN, required for calls)
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Marque du véhicule (renseignée par la sy: Vehicle brand (filled in by the synchronization)
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Motorisation détectée (Electric / Therma: Detected powertrain (Electric / Thermal / Hybrid) — indicative, refined by status tracking
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Fréquence de rafraîchissement des comman: Refresh frequency of the device's info commands
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Cliquer sur ? pour afficher l'assistant: Click ? to display the cron wizard
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Inclure ce véhicule dans le rafraîchisse: Include this vehicle in the automatic periodic refresh. Uncheck to exclude it (quota savings / anti-ban) without deleting it: its latest values are kept.
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Capacité utile de la batterie de tractio: Usable capacity of the traction battery in kWh — manual entry, used to estimate the energy added during a charge (leave empty if unknown)
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Prix du kWh en euros — sert à estimer le: Price per kWh in euros — used to estimate the cost of a charge (informative, leave empty to skip the cost estimate)
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Distance restante en dessous de laquelle: Remaining distance below which the service is flagged as due soon — leave empty to use the default (1000 km)
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Nombre de jours restants en dessous duqu: Number of remaining days below which the service is flagged as due soon — leave empty to use the default (30 days)
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Affiche ce véhicule dans le panneau « Me: Displays this vehicle in the «My vehicles» menu panel
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Nom du véhicule tel que défini dans l'ap: Vehicle name as defined in the mobile app (pre-filled with the commercial designation, editable; filled in by the synchronization)
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Compte Stellantis auquel ce véhicule est: Stellantis account this vehicle is linked to (filled in by the synchronization) — only the primary account allows remote control
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Réveille périodiquement le véhicule pour: Periodically wakes up the vehicle to refresh telemetry (battery, position, charging…) that REST polling alone cannot obtain. Adaptive rate: frequent while charging, rare at rest. Requires OTP activation (remote control).
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.⚠️ Risque batterie 12 V : réveiller le v: ⚠️ 12 V battery risk: waking up the vehicle consumes the auxiliary battery. Excessive use may drain it (starting / keyless access no longer working). Only enable this with full knowledge of the risk.
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/stellanti.Fréquence de réveil automatique quand le: Automatic wake-up frequency while the vehicle is charging — minimum 5 min (anti-ban / battery protection). No effect on a combustion-engine vehicle. Leave empty to use the default (5 min).
Automatic wake-up frequency while the vehicle is at rest — the higher the value, the more the 12 V battery is preserved. Leave empty to use the default (60 min).

plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/panel.php.Aucun véhicule à afficher sur la carte: No vehicle to display on the map
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/panel.php.Les coordonnées sont transmises à OpenSt: The coordinates are sent to OpenStreetMap to display the map
plugins/stellantis/desktop/php/panel.php.Vie privée activée ou véhicule non local: Privacy enabled or vehicle not located
